dashboard.title: Finance overview
dashboard.subtitle: Balance, cash in/out and spending by category

chart.title: Daily cash in/out
chart.empty: No transactions in this period yet

forecast.title: Projected balance this period
forecast.alertTitle: Funds last until {{date}}, then short by {{amount}}
forecast.alertHint: Based on expected income and approved spending plans. Consider requesting a fund top-up from the Founder.

plans.title: Department spending plans
plans.subtitle: Draft & submit your department's monthly spending plan for HR review

empty.title: No spending plans yet
empty.description: Create a spending plan for your department to get started

reject.title: Reject plan?
reject.description: {{name}}'s plan will be returned for revision. Provide a reason:

form.description: List the planned expenses for the period. Submit for HR/Finance to consolidate.
form.lockedHint: Department / period / entity cannot change after creation.

toast.saveError: Could not save the plan. Please try again.
toast.duplicate: This department already has a plan for this period.
toast.forbidden: You can only plan for the department you head.
toast.reviewError: Could not process. Please try again.

topup.title: Fund top-up requests
topup.subtitle: Ask the Founder to approve adding money to the fund

empty.title: No top-up requests yet
empty.description: Raise a request when the forecast shows funds running low

form.description: Request more money for the fund. You can auto-draft the justification from plans & forecast.
form.title: Title
form.autoDraftHint: The draft is composed from approved plans and the period's forecast shortfall — you can edit it.

approve.title: Approve top-up request?
approve.description: Approve topping up {{amount}}. Optionally pick an account to record the deposit now.
approve.hint: If an account is picked, an income "Nạp quỹ" transaction is created and the balance updated.

reject.title: Reject request?
reject.description: Give a reason so the requester understands.

toast.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.
toast.reviewError: Could not process. Please try again.

accounts.title: Fund accounts
accounts.subtitle: Manage the company's cash sources per legal entity

empty.title: No fund accounts yet
empty.description: Add your first account to start tracking cash flow

form.description: A fund account holds money: a bank account, cash, or an e-wallet.
form.openingHint: The current balance is computed from transactions, not entered manually.

delete.title: Delete fund account?
delete.description: Account "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

toast.saveError: Could not save the account. Please try again.
toast.deleteError: Could not delete the account. Please try again.
toast.hasTransactions: This account has transactions — deactivate it instead of deleting.

categories.title: Income / expense categories
categories.subtitle: Classify money in and out for tracking and reporting

toast.saveError: Could not save the category. Please try again.
toast.deleteError: Could not delete the category. Please try again.
toast.inUse: This category is in use — deactivate it instead of deleting.

transactions.title: Transaction ledger
transactions.subtitle: Record the company's money in and out

empty.title: No transactions yet
empty.description: Add an in/out transaction or import from Excel to get started

form.description: Record money in or out. "Actual" transactions update the account balance.
form.statusHint: "Planned" is used for forecasting only and does not affect the current balance.

delete.title: Delete transaction?
delete.description: The transaction will be deleted and the account balance recomputed. This cannot be undone.

toast.saveError: Could not save the transaction. Please try again.
toast.deleteError: Could not delete the transaction. Please try again.

import.title: Import transactions from Excel
import.description: Download the template, fill it in, then upload to preview before saving. Account/category/department match by name.
import.onlyValidNote: Only valid rows will be saved. Rows with errors are skipped.

toast.parseError: Could not read the file. Check the format.
